title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Adobe is seeking a Business Intelligence Analyst to provide data-driven insights across our organization. You'll build dashboards, analyze performance metrics, and support decision-making for business units. Work hybrid in Cincinnati for the global leader in creative, marketing, and document solutions.
responsibilities: Design and develop business intelligence dashboards and reports
Analyze business metrics and identify performance trends
Collaborate with stakeholders to define analytics requirements
Optimize database queries and improve data pipeline efficiency
Document analytical methodologies and maintain data documentation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Analytics, Computer Science, or related field
skills: BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, or Looker)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
